cot_prefix: Okay, so I need to track who has which present after all the swaps. Let me write down the initial assignments first. Original: - Alice: brown - Bob: orange ball - Claire: purple - Dave: yellow - Eve: white Now, let's go through each swap step by step. First swap: Bob and Eve swap. So Bob was holding orange, Eve white. After swapping, Bob has white, and Eve has orange. Now: - Alice: brown - Bob: white - Claire: purple - Dave: yellow - Eve: orange Second swap: Bob and Claire swap. Bob has white, Claire has purple. After swapping, Bob has purple, Claire has white. - Alice: brown - Bob: purple - Claire: white - Dave: yellow - Eve: orange Third swap: Dave and Alice swap. Dave has yellow, Alice has brown. After swapping, Dave has brown, Alice has yellow. - Alice: yellow - Bob: purple - Claire: white - Dave: brown - Eve: orange Fourth swap: Bob and Eve swap again. Bob has purple, Eve has orange.
